action_set_definitions.name: scan_factory_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the comprehensive current state of the factory, including time, inventory levels, machine health, and job backlogs. Use this to initialize the session and monitor progress.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_disassembly
action_set_definitions.description: Processes a core unit to attempt recovery of a shaft. Success depends on the core grade.

machine_id.description: The ID of the disassembly machine to use.

core_type.description: The type of core to disassemble.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_ndt
action_set_definitions.description: Performs Non-Destructive Testing on a recovered component to verify if it is usable for assembly.

machine_id.description: The ID of the NDT machine.

component_id.description: The ID of the shaft to be tested.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_assembly
action_set_definitions.description: Assembles a finished Model-X7 turbocharger using a validated shaft.

machine_id.description: The ID of the assembly machine.

shaft_id.description: The ID of the NDT-passed shaft.

action_set_definitions.name: maintain_machine
action_set_definitions.description: Performs maintenance on a machine to restore its health and prevent breakdown.

machine_id.description: The ID of the machine requiring maintenance.

state_description.current_time_ticks: The current relative time in the factory simulation (e.g., minutes since shift start).
state_description.machines: List of active machines on the floor and their current status.
